name: Cold Stuffed Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the tomatoes and place them in boiling water for 1 minute. Drain and immediately plunge into cold water. Gently remove the skins.
2. With the stem end up, cut each tomato into 4 wedges, cutting to but not through the base of the tomato. Spread the wedges slightly apart. Sprinkle inside of shells with salt. Cover and chill for 1-1/2 hours.
3. Combine the remaining ingredients; cover and chill.
4. To serve, spoon the filling into the shells. Mix mayonnaise with hot sauce and curry powder. Top each tomato with a dollop of this mixture. Serve on lettuce leaves.
